title: Physalastrum macrodon
taxonomy: Physalastrum macrodon is classified as a species of lichen in the family Pyrenulaceae. It belongs to the genus Physalastrum. The classification of this organism is part of the broader field of mycology, which is the study of fungi and other related organisms. The Pyrenulaceae family is a group of lichens that are typically characterized by their crustose growth form. Physalastrum macrodon is a relatively rare species within this family, with limited information available in scientific literature.
